title: Requesting Interface
description: You can initiate an AE autocrafting job by middle-clicking an item in the JEI list.
body:
# Requesting Interface
  You can initiate an AE autocrafting job by middle-clicking an item in the JEI list.
  
![Func](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49531836b65a5fd2ccaf79be94a6e9dede801a4d.gif)

## Dependencies
* [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
* [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

### About

_Want this mod for a different version? Let us know in the comments or by submitting an issue on GitHub!_
